title: AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO CALIGANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF LILOAN, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3429 / 57 OG No. 8, 1373 (February 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2823, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO CALIGANGAN, MUNICIPALITY OF LILOAN, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, INTO A BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Sitio Caligangan, Municipality of Liloan, Province of Leyte, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Caligangan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
